meaning: n.美女,美妇(尤指一群中最为人所倾慕者)
examples: Albert Belle hit a ground ball that appeared destined for right field.
Belle smiled as she slowly sipped her tea.
Belle and the person who wrote her had been apart too long.
So you'd think that publicly traded DST would be the belle of the bear market.
Shooting on Belle, which stars Miranda Richardson and Emily Watson, started on the island last week.
